mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO slot (schedule_id, slot_seq, slot_start, slot_end, status, version, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.scheduleId}, #{item.slotSeq}, #{item.slotStart}, #{item.slotEnd}, 'AVAILABLE', 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, schedule_id, slot_seq, slot_start, slot_end, status, version, create_time, update_time FROM slot WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND status = 'AVAILABLE' ORDER BY slot_seq ASC

SELECT s.id, s.schedule_id, s.slot_seq, s.slot_start, s.slot_end, s.status, s.version, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM slot s INNER JOIN schedule sc ON s.schedule_id = sc.id WHERE sc.department_id = #{departmentId} AND sc.schedule_date = #{scheduleDate} AND sc.status = 1 AND s.status = 'AVAILABLE' ORDER BY s.slot_seq ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM slot WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND status = 'AVAILABLE'
